option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
Home Abstract Submission Presentation Schedule Conference Venue and Transportation

Abstract Submission

Due to limited venue space, this conference is by invitation only. If you received our invitation and can attend the Forum 2026, please kindly confirm your participation by submitting your Abstract and indicating your detailed attendance via either of the codes below by April 8, 2026.

Please contact Dr. Gang Wang (forum2026cuhk@gmail.com) if you have any questions.

Download Abstract Template: Abstract template_Name.docx

Scan/click either one to submit abstract and attendance details.

Google Form
https://forms.gle/NxS2m3Q19KSzrfqT8
Tencent Form
https://docs.qq.com/form/page/DWWFZeWJTZW9iZ1RY

No registration fee is required. Meals will be provided during the Forum.

© Forum 2026 Organizing Committee  |  Designed by Jingyi Liu, using template from Mike Pierce

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Home Abstract Submission Presentation Schedule Conference Venue and Transportation

Abstract Submission

Due to limited venue space, this conference is by invitation only. If you received our invitation and can attend the Forum 2026, please kindly confirm your participation by submitting your Abstract and indicating your detailed attendance via either of the codes below by April 8, 2026.

Session Themes:

  • -Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, and Chemical Technologies
  • -Applied Physics and Quantum Technologies
  • -Materials Science and Interdisciplinary Sciences
  • -Theoretical Simulations and AI for Physical Sciences

Please contact Dr. Gang Wang (forum2026cuhk@gmail.com) if you have any questions.

Download Abstract Template: Abstract template_Name.docx

Scan/click either one to submit abstract and attendance details.

Google Form
https://forms.gle/NxS2m3Q19KSzrfqT8
Tencent Form
https://docs.qq.com/form/page/DWWFZeWJTZW9iZ1RY

No registration fee is required. Meals will be provided during the Forum.

© Forum 2026 Organizing Committee  |  Designed by Jingyi Liu, using template from Mike Pierce
